/voiceai ask — ask a question via text
/voiceai listen — speak directly (STT)

bot.dailyRecap.title: 📋 Daily recap
bot.dailyRecap.prompt: Generate a brief summary (3-4 sentences) of the day for a Discord server that had {messages} messages, {members} new members, and {modActions} moderation actions. Be positive and engaging. Respond in English.
bot.automod.analysisPrompt: Analyze this Discord message and evaluate:
bot.creatures.catchPrompt: Use /catch to capture it! Disappears in 5 minutes.
bot.dailyPoll.title: 📊 Poll of the day — {question}
bot.dailyPoll.q1: What's your favorite video game right now?
bot.dailyPoll.q2: Do you prefer coding in the morning or at night?
bot.dailyPoll.q4: Which social media do you use the most?
bot.dailyPoll.q9: Do you prefer summer or winter?
bot.dailyPoll.q12: Do you mostly play solo or multiplayer?
bot.autonomousAgent.prompt: You are a Discord community analyst. Analyze recent messages and identify trending topics. Respond in JSON with the format: {"topics": [{"topic": "name", "summary": "short summary", "messageCount": N}]}. If no interesting topics, respond {"topics": []}.
bot.autonomousAgent.eventDesc: Automatically created by the AI agent following {count} messages on this topic.
bot.autonomousAgent.eventCreated: 📅 Event automatically created for **{topic}** — tomorrow at {hour}!

bot.autoExport.desc: The suggestion reached **{votes}** votes and has been exported to **{platform}**.
bot.moderationScheduler.title: 🔓 Automatic {action}
bot.setupBridge.completed: Setup completed! {roles} roles and {channels} channels created.
bot.chatbot.defaultPrompt: You are a helpful assistant for this Discord server.
bot.chatbot.faqContext: Here is relevant information from the FAQ:
bot.chatbot.noReply: I don't know what to reply.
bot.chatbot.error: Sorry, I can't respond right now.

web.gameLibrary.desc.chess: The classic strategy game. Face off on an 8x8 board.

web.gameLibrary.desc.go: Ancient territory game. Place stones to control the board.

web.gameLibrary.desc.uno: The famous colorful card game. Get rid of all your cards!
web.gameLibrary.desc.jass: Traditional Swiss card game played in teams of two.
web.gameLibrary.desc.poker: Texas Hold'em. Bluff and bet to win the pot!
web.gameLibrary.desc.mahjong: Chinese tile game. Form winning combinations.
web.gameLibrary.desc.monopoly: Buy, build and bankrupt your opponents!
web.gameLibrary.desc.werewolf: Social deduction game. Villagers must unmask the werewolves.
